parameters.query: SELECT id, name, source_platform, url, similarity_score, priority, last_checked_at FROM competitor_sources WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY priority

INSERT INTO competitor_price_observations
  (competitor_source_id, stay_date_from, stay_date_to, nights,
   price_per_night, availability_status, confidence,
   collection_method, notes)
VALUES
  ('{{ $json.q_source_id }}', '{{ $json.q_from }}', '{{ $json.q_to }}',
   {{ $json.q_nights }}, null, '{{ $json.q_status }}', null,
   '{{ $json.q_method }}', '{{ $json.q_notes }}');
UPDATE competitor_sources SET last_checked_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.q_source_id }}';
